chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR N0,0-1689 0{ 2023 Dat٤ Order with signature OL JLCge For hearing of main casg 27.02.2024 Mr. Khan Muhammad Sangi Advocate for the Petitioners Mr, Shahryar Imdad Awan, AAG along with Inspector Rajib Ali Maitlo SHO PS, Ali Abad SBA and Inspector Muhammad Nawaz ٥nn٦ ٣ ٣ ٠ ٠ ٦ ٣ ٣ ٠٤وو Petitioners are accused in FIR bearing Crime N0.208 0f 2023, registered Mehrabpur, District Naushahro Feroze {٥٢ offence under Section 302, 324, 452, 147, 148, 149, 337-H2, SO4 PPC and have pproached this Court directly for reinvestigation of the C٥5٤ At the outset learned AAG pointed out that in this case challan has already been submitted and the remedy available in this regard is to approach the trial Court Since challan has been submitted therefore tne petitioners ٢3٧ approach the trial Court for such purpose as the tria Court has taken cognizance of the offence This petition for this purpose has been filed directly before this Court misconceived and accordingly dismissed in tne above terms
